appearance.darkPreviewDescription: URLs under /dark/… force dark styling for testing without enabling the feature flag.

home.title: Carwoods — Houston rentals, managed right
home.metaDescription: Houston rentals and property management: clear applications, consistent communication, on-time rent collection, proactive maintenance, and disciplined asset care.
home.heroSubtitle: Clear applications. Consistent communication. On-time rent collection, proactive maintenance, and disciplined asset care.
home.heroImageAlt: Keys to a new home resting on a welcome mat
home.midHeroAlt: Modern home exterior with warm evening light
home.highlight1Detail: Local leasing rhythms, not generic playbooks
home.highlight2Detail: Applications, rent, and maintenance in one flow
home.rentersBody: Looking for a lease in Houston? We keep the path honest: what you need to apply, what to expect, and people who pick up the phone.
home.rentersBullet1: Streamlined application steps and required-documents guidance
home.rentersBullet2: Local listings mindset—we know this market's rhythms
home.rentersBullet3: Respect for your time: fewer surprises, clearer next steps
home.ownersBody: Hand us the keys to the busywork. We market vacancies, screen tenants, coordinate repairs, and report back so you can stay focused on the big picture.
home.ownersBullet1: Full-service property management tailored to your goals
home.ownersBullet3: Steady communication—you're never guessing what's happening

apply.title: Carwoods - How to Apply
apply.metaDescription: How to apply to rent a Carwoods property. Review criteria, gather documents, and submit your rental application online.
apply.heading: How to Apply to Rent
apply.intro: All the information you need to apply is on this site. No need to call — follow the steps below. When you finish reviewing eligibility or the documents list, use Back to How to Apply at the top of those pages to return here and continue with step 3.
apply.step2BodySuffix: list so your application is complete.
apply.step3Body: Choose a property below to start the online application (RentSpree). Each card also links to the full listing for photos and details.

contact.title: Carwoods - Contact Us
contact.metaDescription: Start with our Apply page for leasing steps and documents. Contact our HAR.com agent when you need direct help after following that process.
contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.para1Prefix: For rental applications and most leasing-related questions, please begin with our
contact.para1Suffix: page. It explains eligibility, required documentation, and how to submit through the listing channel. Following that workflow first allows us to assist you efficiently and consistently.
contact.para2: If you have already worked through those steps, or you have a matter that cannot be addressed there—such as property management services or another topic that requires direct outreach—please contact our licensed agent on HAR.com (Houston Association of Realtors). We encourage using this channel when self-service options are not sufficient.
contact.ctaAriaLabel: Contact our agent on HAR.com (opens in new tab)

privacy.title: Carwoods - Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Carwoods privacy policy — how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Carwoods ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy describes how we handle information when you use our website and services.
privacy.collectBody: When you visit our site, we may collect information you provide directly, such as when you contact us or submit an application. If you use third-party services (e.g., HAR.com for property inquiries or applications), their privacy policies govern that data.
privacy.useBody: We use information to respond to inquiries, process applications, provide property management services, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your personal information.
privacy.thirdPartyBody: Our site may link to external services (e.g., Texas Real Estate Commission, HAR.com). We are not responsible for their privacy practices. Please review their policies before sharing information.
privacy.contactBody: For privacy-related questions or to request access to your information, contact us through our

accessibility.title: Carwoods - Accessibility Statement
accessibility.metaDescription: Carwoods commitment to digital accessibility and WCAG compliance.
accessibility.heading: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.intro: Carwoods is committed to ensuring our website is accessible to people with disabilities. We aim to comply with the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 at Level AA.
accessibility.measure1: Semantic HTML and clear heading structure
accessibility.measure2: Keyboard navigable content with visible focus indicators
accessibility.measure4: Color contrast that meets WCAG guidelines
accessibility.measure5: A skip link to main content for keyboard users
accessibility.feedbackBody: If you encounter any accessibility barriers on our site, please contact us through our
accessibility.feedbackBodySuffix: page. We will work to address the issue promptly.
